title: Enrolments at schools and in funded pre-school education in Northern Ireland: 2016 to 2017
body: "Enrolment data from the 2016/17 annual school census was released in December 2016. The purpose of this statistical release is to present a more detailed analysis of enrolment figures for schools in Northern Ireland. The data are taken from the school census exercise, which ran in October 2016.  "
